narrative.description: Kingdom Hearts II (2005) is a acclaimed action rpg title recognized in retro gaming lists for its distinctive mechanics, pacing, and lasting influence on the genre.
narrative.core_loop: Real-time combat against large foes with craftable gear and stat growth.
